## Description
What is wrong with the data?

## Data Source
Where does it come from?

## Problem Type
- [ ] Missing values (NaN)
- [ ] Cloud contamination
- [ ] Mislabeling
- [ ] Corrupted files
- [ ] Format issue

## Example
Provide sample or reference.

## Validation Output
- cloud_ratio:
- nan_ratio:
- other metrics:

## Impact
- [ ] Breaks ingestion
- [ ] Affects validation
- [ ] Affects model training

## Suggested Fix
If known.
